name: tele-coach
description: Tele Coach - Real-time call coaching assistant that detects objections and provides intelligent response guidance.
author: Creditsafe Limited

scripts.dev: npm run free-port && npm run rebuild-native && npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron app/electron/dist/app/electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dev:smoke: npm run typecheck && npm run dev
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/prepack-whisper.js mac arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && node scripts/prepack-whisper.js mac x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && node scripts/prepack-whisper.js win x64 && electron-builder --win
